title: S.O.M X FROM THE FOG
description: Makes Herobrine in the From The Fog Mod/Datapack look like the Story of Minecraft Herobrine
body:
![S.O.M X From The Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9af979ba27ba0db6da473e1557ccfbf35aae8a7f.png)
___________________________
> # Description
> **_This is a Compatibility resourcepack for the From The Fog Mod/Datapack that makes the Herobrine in the Mod/Datapack look like my Herobrine in Story of Minecraft so you can actually have HIM in your world and he'll match the resourcepack._**
___________________________
> # Dependencies
[![From-The-Fog](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7f303329e8e7d5dee06dea1a2caf459b00a0876.webp)](https://modrinth.com/mod/from-the-fog)
You [**DO**] need this Mod/Datapack for this to work obviously, This Resourcepack is not affiliated with the From the Fog Mod/Datapack or The creator of the Mod/Datapack Luner Eclipse Studios but it is made to be used in addition to the Mod/Datapack. _If you install the Datapack you need to put the Datapack in the datapacks folder of your world and in the resourcepacks folder of that version of Minecraft, the datapack will show up as a resourcepack in game, turn on the resourcepack and then put this Resourcepack over the original Resourcepack like this._
___________________________
![**_Example_**](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f4bfe236fb3ce53753dd7d0410d7b63b182f82_0.webp)
___________________________
[![STORY OF MINECRAFT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96f9b645ee0ef11a5e806c5e39776ba6cb50ad9a.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/story-of-minecraft) 
___________________________
> # Recommended with From-the-Fog
I Recommend these Mods with From-the-Fog they add to the creepy atmosphere.
_**This Resourcepack doesn't change anything in the Mods.**_
___________________________
[![Nether Weather](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e821cf4c7f9b47dcc89f3359494040f3f93d6459.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherweather)

___________________________
